brand_identity: Catholic Professionals PNG - A respectful, connected, and grounded professional community.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter font-medium text-[#1C2522] leading-tight
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl tracking-tight font-medium text-[#1C2522] leading-tight

typography.instructions: Import Cormorant Garamond and Manrope from Google Fonts in index.css. Never use Inter for headings.

surfaces.card: bg-[#F8F5F0] border border-[#1C2522]/10 rounded-sm p-8 transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg
surfaces.input: bg-transparent border-b border-[#1C2522]/20 rounded-none px-0 py-2 focus:border-[#C29B57] focus:ring-0 outline-none transition-colors

media.instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: The prompt specifically requires using pictures from the provided zip file (234 images). YOU MUST search the local '/app/public', '/app/src/assets' or wherever the zip was extracted to find these images. Use them extensively throughout the site (Hero collage, Photo Gallery, Events, Member profiles). Do NOT use generic placeholders if local files are available. For gallery, load dynamically or sample a large chunk of them.

components.navigation: Sticky glass header (z-50) with Logo, Links, and a Primary CTA ('Join Us' or 'Contact'). Desktop links must be visible.
components.hero: Asymmetric split layout. Left: Massive H1 (Cormorant Garamond), short description, and CTA. Right: A tight bento grid (2x2 or 3x2) showcasing 3-4 actual community photos from the zip file to immediately show authenticity.
components.about: Rich text section with wide leading. Add a subtle paper texture background or a very light #EAE5DC container. Use drop-caps for the first paragraph.
components.events_news: Bento Grid Mode A (Tetris grid). Large featured event spanning col-span-full md:col-span-8, smaller news items spanning col-span-4. Use Shadcn cards but strip the borders/shadows to match our 'Solid Background + sharp 1px border' style.
components.gallery: Masonry or dense bento grid specifically to showcase the 234 provided images. Images should have max-h-[80vh] on mobile to prevent scrolling fatigue. Add a 'Load More' or infinite scroll if all 234 are used.
components.contact: Shadcn Form (customized). Input fields should use the 'surfaces.input' style (bottom borders only, no rounded corners) for an elegant, editorial feel.

motion.hover: Subtle -translate-y-1 and shadow-lg on cards. Buttons should shift background color slightly and scale up 1%.
motion.scroll: Use framer-motion for staggered entrance of the gallery images (fade up, y: 20 -> 0).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure #4A5D54 and #1C2522 on #F8F5F0 meet WCAG AA.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='contact-submit-button', data-testid='gallery-image-1').
